name: Jira & Confluence
description: Access Jira issues, boards, sprints, and Confluence pages through AI chat. Powered by Atlassian's official Rovo MCP server.
user_auth_instructions:
Click 'Connect' to sign in with your Atlassian account.
You'll be asked to authorize access to your Jira data.
setup_notes:
Uses Atlassian's official Rovo MCP server.

The server supports both Jira and Confluence.

Authentication:
- OAuth 2.1 (recommended): Automatic browser-based consent flow
- API Token: Basic auth with email + API token
  (must be enabled by your Atlassian admin)

Setup:
1. Configure your MCP client to connect to:
   https://mcp.atlassian.com/v1/mcp
2. When prompted, sign in with your Atlassian account
3. Grant access to your Jira/Confluence data

Rate limits by plan:
- Free: 500 calls/hour
- Standard/Premium: 1000+ calls/hour

Note: Legacy SSE endpoint (mcp.atlassian.com/v1/sse)
will be deprecated after June 30, 2026.
